title: USD.AI (CHIP) Gains 3.23% as AI-Powered Stablecoin Alternative Climbs Market Rankings
excerpt: USD.AI's native token CHIP has surged 3.23% in the past 24 hours, trading at $0.062809 as the AI-driven cryptocurrency project continues to gain traction. The token now holds the #246 position by market capitalization, showcasing growing investor interest in AI-integrated financial solutions.
